body_txt: Just like glasses , braces can be a source of mockery and teasing. Insulting somebody for having braces is a common tactic for bullies, especially the Alpha Bitch and Jerk Jock . Mean nicknames for those with braces include "bear trap," "braceface," "metal mouth," and "train tracks." "Freak," "geek," and the ever-popular "nerd" are also commonly part of the repertoire for braces bullying. Although this can and does happen to people of all genders and sexes, girls and women who wear braces are the most frequent victims because of how much pressure society places on girls and women to have beautiful smiles . Hollywood viewing braces as homely or ugly doesn't help in this regard. Bullying like this may drive someone who has braces to try and hide their smile. Unfortunately, this is Truth in Television , especially among adolescents. However, studies show that many young people experience less bullying and more self-confidence after beginning to wear braces if they were previously picked on for having crooked/misaligned teeth and/or a tooth gap. All that said, because of the sensitive nature of this topic centered around being bullied for something that's out of one's control, No Real Life Examples, Please! Compare Bullying the Bespectacled and Bullying the Disabled , the former of which may overlap with this. Related to Braces of Orthodontic Overkill , Childish Tooth Gap , and Pubescent Braces , all of which might overlap with this.
